questions: Identify the digital resource that serves as the major output of the joint IUSSP and UNFPA project intended to update tools for demographic estimation from limited and defective data, acting as a direct successor to UN Manual X. Within this platform, locate the specific guide authored by T.A. Moultrie concerning the 'evaluation and correction of fertility data'. Provide the full 'Suggested citation' for this specific guide as presented on the site, ensuring all editors and publication details are included.

rounds.rationale: The question requires Deep Reasoning to identify the 'Tools for Demographic Estimation' website based on its history (UN Manual X lineage) and organizational backing (IUSSP/UNFPA). It requires detailed extraction to retrieve the specific citation components for a sub-section of that site, rather than just the website title.

rounds.meta_context_snippet: [Wide Logic - Target 0]: Evaluation and correction of fertility data Author Moultrie TA Printer-friendly version Suggested citation Moultrie TA. 2011. Evaluation and correction of fertility data. In M
rounds.answer_a:
The major digital resource is the **Tools for Demographic Estimation (TDE)** platform, the successor to UN Manual X, developed by the IUSSP and UNFPA [1]. Within it, the specific guide is **"The evaluation and adjustment of fertility data"** authored by T.A. Moultrie [1]. The full suggested citation is: Moultrie, T.A. 2023. The evaluation and adjustment of fertility data. In: Tools for Demographic Estimation. Paris: International Union for the Scientific Study of Population [2]. Retrieved from: https://demographicsestimation.iussp.org/content/evaluation-and-adjustment-fertility-data (Accessed: [Date]) [2]. Editors are T.A. Moultrie, P. Gerland, S. Helleringer, and others, published as part of the IUSSP Online Demographic Estimation Series [2].

## References
[1] Tools for Demographic Estimation. https://demographicestimation.iussp.org/
[2] Moultrie, T.A. 2023. The evaluation and adjustment of fertility data. In: Tools for Demographic Estimation. International Union for the Scientific Study of Population. https://demographicestimation.iussp.org/content/evaluation-and-adjustment-fertility-data
